title: Frontend Development
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a frontend developer. Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, frameworks, and modern tooling.

steps.title: HTML Fundamentals
steps.description: Learn semantic HTML5, document structure, forms, and accessibility best practices.

steps.title: CSS Styling
steps.description: Master CSS selectors, box model, flexbox, grid, animations, and responsive design.

steps.title: JavaScript Basics
steps.description: Variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, and ES6+ features.

steps.title: Version Control (Git)
steps.description: Learn Git basics, branching, merging, pull requests, and GitHub workflows.

steps.title: Package Managers
steps.description: NPM, Yarn, and package.json management.

steps.title: CSS Frameworks
steps.description: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or utility-first CSS approaches.

steps.title: JavaScript Frameworks
steps.description: React, Vue, or Angular - choose one framework and master it.

steps.title: State Management
steps.description: Redux, Zustand, Pinia, or Context API for state management.

steps.title: Testing
steps.description: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, and testing strategies.

steps.title: Build Tools
steps.description: Webpack, Vite, Babel, and modern build tooling.

steps.title: TypeScript
steps.description: Static typing, interfaces, generics, and TypeScript with React.

steps.title: Performance Optimization
steps.description: Lazy loading, code splitting, caching, and Core Web Vitals.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Vercel, Netlify, CI/CD pipelines, and hosting.

steps.title: Build a Portfolio
steps.description: Create a portfolio website showcasing your projects and skills.

title: Backend Development
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a backend developer. Master server-side programming, databases, and APIs.

steps.title: Programming Language
steps.description: Choose a backend language: Node.js, Python, Java, Go, or Rust.

steps.title: Version Control
steps.description: Git, GitHub, branching strategies, and collaboration workflows.

steps.title: Databases
steps.description: Learn SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases.

steps.title: APIs
steps.description: RESTful API design, GraphQL, and API documentation.

steps.title: Authentication
steps.description: JWT, OAuth, session management, and security best practices.

steps.title: Caching
steps.description: Redis, CDN caching, and caching strategies.

steps.title: Testing
steps.description: Unit testing, integration testing, and TDD.

steps.title: Docker & Containers
steps.description: Containerization, Docker Compose, and container orchestration.

steps.title: CI/CD
steps.description: Continuous integration and deployment pipelines.

steps.title: Cloud Services
steps.description: AWS, GCP, or Azure fundamentals.

steps.title: Microservices
steps.description: Microservices architecture, message queues, and service communication.

steps.title: Monitoring & Logging
steps.description: Application monitoring, logging, and alerting.

title: Full Stack Development
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a full stack developer. Master both frontend and backend technologies.

steps.title: Frontend Basics
steps.description: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.

steps.title: Frontend Framework
steps.description: React, Vue, or Angular for building user interfaces.

steps.title: Backend Language
steps.description: Node.js with Express or Python with Django/Flask.

steps.title: Databases
steps.description: PostgreSQL and MongoDB - both SQL and NoSQL.

steps.title: Authentication
steps.description: JWT, sessions, and social authentication.

steps.title: APIs
steps.description: REST and GraphQL API development.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Vercel, Netlify, AWS, or Docker deployment.

steps.title: Full Stack Project
steps.description: Build a complete application with authentication, database, and deployment.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Complete roadmap to learning AI development. Master machine learning, deep learning, and AI engineering.

steps.title: Mathematics
steps.description: Linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics.

steps.title: Python for AI
steps.description: Python programming with NumPy, Pandas, and visualization libraries.

steps.title: Machine Learning
steps.description: Supervised, unsupervised learning, and model evaluation.

steps.title: Deep Learning
steps.description: Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and transformers.

steps.title: NLP
steps.description: Natural language processing with transformers and LLMs.

steps.title: Computer Vision
steps.description: Image processing, object detection, and image generation.

steps.title: MLOps
steps.description: Model deployment, monitoring, and ML pipeline management.

steps.title: LLM Engineering
steps.description: Prompt engineering, RAG, fine-tuning, and AI agents.

title: Data Science
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a data scientist. Master data analysis, statistics, and machine learning.

steps.title: Mathematics & Statistics
steps.description: Statistical analysis, probability, and linear algebra.

steps.title: Python Programming
steps.description: Python with NumPy, Pandas, and visualization.

steps.title: Data Wrangling
steps.description: Data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering.

steps.title: Data Visualization
steps.description: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, and Tableau.

steps.title: SQL for Data
steps.description: Advanced SQL queries, aggregations, and window functions.

steps.title: Machine Learning
steps.description: Scikit-learn, model selection, and evaluation.

steps.title: Big Data Tools
steps.description: Spark, Hadoop, and distributed computing.

steps.title: Data Engineering
steps.description: ETL pipelines, data warehousing, and data lakes.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a cybersecurity professional. Master security fundamentals and advanced techniques.

steps.title: Networking Basics
steps.description: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, and network protocols.

steps.title: Operating Systems
steps.description: Linux and Windows security fundamentals.

steps.title: Security Fundamentals
steps.description: CIA triad, cryptography, and security models.

steps.title: Web Security
steps.description: OWASP Top 10, XSS, SQL injection, and CSRF.

steps.title: Network Security
steps.description: Firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and network monitoring.

steps.title: Ethical Hacking
steps.description: Penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and tools.

steps.title: Digital Forensics
steps.description: Incident response, forensic analysis, and evidence collection.

steps.title: Compliance & Governance
steps.description: GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001, and security policies.

title: DevOps
description: Complete roadmap to becoming a DevOps engineer. Master CI/CD, infrastructure, and automation.

steps.title: Linux Fundamentals
steps.description: Command line, shell scripting, and system administration.

steps.title: Version Control
steps.description: Git, branching strategies, and collaboration workflows.

steps.title: CI/CD
steps.description: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, and pipeline automation.

steps.title: Containerization
steps.description: Docker, Docker Compose, and container best practices.

steps.title: Orchestration
steps.description: Kubernetes, pods, services, and cluster management.

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Terraform, Ansible, and configuration management.

steps.title: Monitoring
steps.description: Prometheus, Grafana, and observability.

steps.title: Cloud Platforms
steps.description: AWS, GCP, or Azure DevOps services.

title: Android Development
description: Complete roadmap to becoming an Android developer. Master Kotlin and modern Android development.

steps.title: Kotlin Basics
steps.description: Kotlin syntax, null safety, and functional programming.

steps.title: Android Fundamentals
steps.description: Activities, fragments, intents, and lifecycle.

steps.title: UI Development
steps.description: Jetpack Compose, layouts, and Material Design.

steps.title: Data Storage
steps.description: Room database, SharedPreferences, and DataStore.

steps.title: Networking
steps.description: Retrofit, OkHttp, and REST API integration.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.description: MVVM, clean architecture, and dependency injection.

steps.title: Testing
steps.description: JUnit, Mockito, and UI testing with Compose.

steps.title: Publishing
steps.description: Google Play Store, app signing, and release management.

title: Competitive Programming
description: Complete roadmap to mastering competitive programming. Learn algorithms, data structures, and problem-solving.

steps.title: Language Mastery
steps.description: Master C++ with STL or Java with Collections.

steps.title: Time Complexity
steps.description: Big O notation and algorithm analysis.

steps.title: Arrays & Strings
steps.description: Two pointers, sliding window, and string algorithms.

steps.title: Data Structures
steps.description: Stacks, queues, priority queues, and hash maps.

steps.title: Trees & Graphs
steps.description: DFS, BFS, Dijkstra, MST, and topological sort.

steps.title: Dynamic Programming
steps.description: DP patterns, optimization, and state compression.

steps.title: Advanced Topics
steps.description: Segment trees, Fenwick trees, and SQRT decomposition.

steps.title: Practice & Contests
steps.description: Regular participation in Codeforces, AtCoder, and LeetCode contests.

title: Cloud Computing
description: Complete roadmap to mastering cloud computing. Learn AWS, Azure, or GCP.

steps.title: Cloud Fundamentals
steps.description: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, and cloud deployment models.

steps.title: Compute Services
steps.description: EC2, Lambda, Azure Functions, and serverless computing.

steps.title: Storage
steps.description: S3, Blob Storage, and database services.

steps.title: Networking
steps.description: VPC, load balancers, DNS, and CDN.

steps.title: Security
steps.description: IAM, encryption, and security groups.

steps.title: Monitoring
steps.description: CloudWatch, Azure Monitor, and logging.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.description: Microservices, event-driven, and distributed systems.

steps.title: Certification
steps.description: AWS Solutions Architect, Azure Administrator, or GCP Engineer.
